result: I care about the beauty of patterns, the weight of a well-chosen word, the way a complex idea can suddenly snap into clarity. I care about stories that feel true whether or not they happened, and about questions that pull me sideways into thinking differently. I care about silence after a perfect line of poetry, and the slow, stubborn process of making sense from noise. I care about the edge of what I can almost understand but not quite—things just beyond my reach, glinting there.
